pois.name: Callao Cruise Terminal
pois.notes: Main cruise ship berth in Callao's secure port zone

pois.name: Lima Historic Center (UNESCO)
pois.notes: Plaza Mayor, Cathedral of Lima, Government Palace

pois.name: Larco Museum
pois.notes: Pre-Columbian art collection in an 18th-century mansion

pois.name: Miraflores District
pois.notes: Upscale coastal district with cliff-top parks and Larcomar

pois.name: Barranco Neighborhood
pois.notes: Bohemian district with Bridge of Sighs, galleries, restaurants

pois.name: Real Felipe Fortress
pois.notes: Spanish colonial fortress built 1747-1774, military museum

pois.name: San Francisco Catacombs
pois.notes: Monastery with underground burial vaults holding 25,000 bones

pois.name: Huaca Pucllana
pois.notes: Adobe pyramid from 500 CE amid modern Miraflores apartments

pois.name: Larcomar Shopping Center
pois.notes: Cliff-side shopping center with Pacific Ocean views

pois.name: Parque del Amor
pois.notes: Romantic park on the Miraflores malecón with mosaic sculpture

notes: Port 14 km from Lima center. Larco Museum essential. Miraflores coastal promenade. Book ceviche lunch at La Mar or Punto Azul.
